final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-art
Asset type: editorial illustration, book cover or print
Primary request: watercolor illustration of Provence lavender fields in a European village
Scene/backdrop: outskirts of a quiet village in southern France, rolling hills with vast purple lavender fields stretching to the horizon, winding gravel path lined with tall cypress trees, ancient stone mill with orange roof on distant hillside
Subject: elderly farmer wearing straw hat working in lavender field, wooden handcart filled with lavender bundles in foreground
Style/medium: transparent watercolor technique, light and airy brushstrokes, luminous color washes
Composition/framing: wide scenic landscape with foreground detail, depth from front cart to distant mill
Lighting/mood: bright sunny day, cheerful and romantic pastoral atmosphere
Color palette: lavender purple, azure blue sky, fresh greens, warm orange roof accents, harmonious pastel tones
Materials/textures: translucent watercolor washes, soft paper texture, delicate brushwork
Constraints: preserve the transparent watercolor technique with luminous colors, maintain the warm healing pastoral mood
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, heavy opaque colors, digital smooth gradients, cluttered composition
